creator: Kees.Koster@nym.sc.philips.com
text:
There is a minor glitch in the manual cross-references. Manual pages
for sync(2), sync(8) and fsync(2) refer to the update(8) manual page,
while they should be referring to the update(4) page.

Fix: 

Well, I'd say that's rather trivial ;)
How-To-Repeat: 
man 2 sync
man 2 fsync
man 8 sync
